exceptions.description: Snowstorm closure I-80 westbound — 14 shipments rerouted via I-70
Carrier failed pickup at Boston distribution center, rescheduled +1 day
Pallet collapse during transit — 3 units damaged, claim filed
Ice storm delays across I-90 corridor, ETAs pushed 48hrs
Cross-border shipment held at Otay Mesa — paperwork discrepancy
Reefer unit malfunction on I-75, temp-sensitive load at risk
Fog-related pileup on I-5 near Grapevine — 6hr delay
Late arrival at Newark hub caused missed linehaul to Charlotte
Consignee address invalid — shipment held at Dallas terminal
No available drivers for Atlanta-to-Miami lane, delayed 2 days
Forklift damage at Phoenix cross-dock — customer notified
Second no-show this month from same carrier — escalated to procurement
BOL mismatch on Chicago outbound — shipment held for audit
Axle weight exceeded at Donner Pass weigh station — reloaded
Hurricane warning — Jacksonville port operations suspended 3 days
